feed.title: Freedom and Dignity Project
feed.subtitle: A Third Bill of Rights for the 21st century

entry.title: Freedom and Dignity Project — A Third Bill of Rights
entry.summary: A comprehensive structural reform platform organized around five foundations and 24 policy pillars — a Third Bill of Rights for the 21st century.

entry.title: A Letter from the Founder
entry.summary: A personal letter on why this platform exists, what drives it forward, and what the Freedom and Dignity Project can become for America.

entry.title: Foundation I: Accountable Power
entry.summary: Seven pillars addressing executive power, elections, anti-corruption, checks and balances, courts, term limits, administrative state, and legislative reform.

entry.title: Foundation II: We the People
entry.summary: Two pillars addressing antitrust and corporate power, and the integrity of information and media systems that democracy depends on.

entry.title: Foundation III: Equal Justice
entry.summary: Four pillars ensuring equal justice and policing, humane immigration, robust civil liberties, and a foreign policy grounded in human rights.

entry.title: Foundation IV: Real Freedom
entry.summary: Three pillars covering gun policy, technology and AI governance, and consumer rights — because freedom requires protection from both state and private power.

entry.title: Foundation V: Freedom to Thrive
entry.summary: Eight pillars covering healthcare, taxation, environment, infrastructure, education, labor rights, housing, and science — the material conditions of a free life.
